test-method.name: regular_Longterm_Market_Day
test-method.description: Regular | Longterm | Market | Day

test-method.name: regular_Longterm_Market_Immediate
test-method.description: Regular | Longterm | Market | Immediate

test-method.name: regular_Longterm_Limit_Day
test-method.description: Regular | Longterm | Limit | Day

test-method.name: regular_Longterm_Limit_Immediate
test-method.description: Regular | Longterm | Limit | Immediate

test-method.name: regular_Longterm_SL_Day
test-method.description: Regular | Longterm | SL | Day

test-method.name: regular_Longterm_SL_Immediate
test-method.description: Regular | Longterm | SL | Immediate

test-method.name: regular_Longterm_SLM_Day
test-method.description: Regular | Longterm | SL-M | Day

test-method.name: regular_Longterm_SLM_Immediate
test-method.description: Regular | Longterm | SL-M | Immediate

test-method.name: verifyQuantityAs0
test-method.description: TC_001 - Buy order with quantity = 0 should not be accepted

exception.message: Test failed — invalid value was accepted expected [false] but found [true]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Test failed — invalid value was accepted expected [false] but found [true] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1590) at org.testng.Assert.assertFalse(Assert.java:79) at pageObject.BuyFlow.invalidQuantity_Price(BuyFlow.java:272) at testCases.SellingCombinations.verifyQuantityAs0(SellingCombinations.java:85) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:141) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:697) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeTestMethod(TestInvoker.java:230) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:134) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:744) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:616) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:421) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runSequentially(SuiteRunner.java:413) at test-method.name: verifyQuantityAs0
test-method.description: TC_001 - Buy order with quantity = 0 should not be accepted

test-method.name: verifyQuantityLessThan0
test-method.description: TC_002 - Buy order with quantity < 0 should not be accepted

test-method.name: priceMorethanCircuit
test-method.description: TC_006 - Buy order with price above upper circuit should not be accepted

test-method.name: priceMorethanCircuit
test-method.description: TC_006 - Buy order with price above upper circuit should not be accepted

test-method.name: priceLessthanCircuit
test-method.description: TC_007 - Buy order with price below lower circuit should not be accepted

test-method.name: triggerPriceLessThanMarketPrice
test-method.description: TC_009 - Buy order where trigger price < market price should not be accepted
